markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Robot Operating System 2 (ROS 2)

A curated list of awesome Robot Operating System Version 2.0 (ROS 2) resources and libraries.

The Robot Operating System 2 (ROS 2) is a set of software libraries and tools that help you build robot applications. From drivers to state-of-the-art algorithms, and with powerful developer tools, ROS 2 has what you need for your next robotics project. And it’s all open source.

Contents

  • Packages
  • Forks
  • Operating systems
  • Documentation
  • Community
  • Books
  • Courses
  • Presentations
  • Papers
  • Podcasts
  • Services
  • Companies
  • Organizations
  • Working groups

Packages

Demonstrations

  • adlink_ddsbotstars34 - The ROS 2.0/1.0 based robots swarm architecture (opensplice DDS).
  • adlink_neuronbotstars9 - ROS2/DDS robot pkg for human following and swarm.
  • turtlebot3 - ROS2 based TurtleBot3 demo including Bringup, Teleop and Cartographer.

Examples

  • turtlebot2_demostars69 - TurtleBot 2 demos using ROS 2.
  • examples/rclcpp - C++ examples.
  • examples/rclpy - Python examples.
  • rcljava_examples - Package containing examples of how to use the rcljava API.
  • ros2_talker_android, ros2_listener_androidstars10 - Example Android apps for the ROS2 Java bindings.

Benchmarking

  • ros2_benchmarkingstars31 - Framework for ROS2 benchmarking. ROS2 communication characteristics can be evaluated on several axes, quickly and in an automated way.
  • performance_teststars61 - Test performance and latency of various communication means like ROS 2, FastRTPS and Connext DDS Micro.

Containerization

  • docker-ros2-ospl-cestars8 - A dockerfile to build a ROS2 + OpenSplice CE container.
  • ros2_java_dockerstars4 - Dockerfiles for building ros2_java with OpenJDK and Android.
  • micro-ROS/dockerstars18 - Docker-related material to setup, configure and develop with micro-ROS hardware.
  • ros-tooling/cross_compilestars80 - Cross compile ROS and ROS 2 workspaces to non-native architectures and generate corresponding Docker images.

Ecosystem

  • Link ROS - Cloud Logging for ROS 1 and ROS 2.
  • rosbag2stars58 - ROS2 native rosbag.
  • rvizstars58 - 3D Robot Visualizer.
  • urdfdomstars0 - URDF (U-Robot Description Format) library which provides core data structures and a simple XML parser
  • urdfdom_headersstars0 - Headers for URDF parsers.
  • ros2clistars56 - ROS 2 command line tools.
  • orocos_kinematics_dynamicsstars5 - Orocos Kinematics and Dynamics C++ library.
  • pyddsstars18 - Simple DDS Python API for Vortex Lite and for OpenSplice.
  • Webots - Robot simulator for ROS 2.
  • LGSVL - Simulation software to accelerate safe autonomous vehicle development.
  • Unity Robotics Hubstars526 - This is a central repository for tools, tutorials, resources, and documentation for robotic simulation in Unity.
  • Foxglove Studiostars141 - Integrated visualization and diagnosis tool for robotics (support for ROS 2 coming soon).

Interactivity

  • Jupyter ROS2stars5 - Jupyter widget helpers for ROS2.

Penetration testing

  • aztarnastars82 - A footprinting tool for robots.
  • ros2_fuzzerstars11 - ROS2 Topic & Service Fuzzer.

Application layer

  • Apex.Autonomy - Apex.Autonomy provides autonomy algorithms as individual building blocks and is compatible with Autoware.Auto.
  • Autoware.Auto - Autoware.Auto provides an open-source software stack based on ROS 2 for self-driving technology.
  • ros2_controlstars75 - ros2_control is a proof of concept on how new features within ROS 2 can be elaborated and used in the context of robot control (ros2_controllers).
  • ros2_controllersstars39 - Description of ros_controllers.
  • geometry2stars24 - A set of ROS packages for keeping track of coordinate transforms.
  • ros2-ORB_SLAM2stars27 - ROS2 node wrapping the ORB_SLAM2 library.
  • basalt_ros2stars15 - ROS2 wrapper for Basalt VIO.
  • cartographerstars21 - Real-time simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) in 2D and 3D across multiple platforms and sensor configurations.
  • slam_gmappingstars21 - Slam Gmapping for ROS2.
  • slam_toolboxstars488 - Slam Toolbox for lifelong mapping and localization in potentially massive maps with ROS.
  • lidarslam_ros2stars85 - ROS2 package of 3D lidar slam using ndt/gicp registration and pose-optimization.
  • li_slam_ros2stars72 - ROS2 package of tightly-coupled lidar inertial ndt/gicp slam referenced from LIO-SAM.
  • octomap_server2stars2 - ROS2 stack for mapping with OctoMap. Port of the ROS1 octomap_mappingstars152 package.
  • vision_opencv - Packages for interfacing ROS2 with OpenCV.
  • teleop_twist_keyboardstars7 - Generic Keyboard Teleop for ROS2.
  • teleop_twist_joystars4 - Simple joystick teleop for twist robots.
  • navigationstars572 - ROS2 Navigation stack.
  • diagnostics - Forked version of the original ROS1 Diagnostics for ROS 2 (currently diagnostics_updater only).
  • robot_state_publisher - Forked version of the original ROS Robot State Publisher with all modifications to compile within a ROS2 Ecosystem.
  • common_interfacesstars37 - A set of packages which contain common interface files (.msg and .srv).
  • ros2_object_mapstars8 - "Mark tag of objects on map when SLAM".
  • ros2_object_analyticsstars71 - Object Analytics (OA) is ROS2 wrapper for realtime object detection, localization and tracking.
  • ros2_intel_movidius_ncsstars25 - ROS2 wrapper for Movidius™ Neural Compute Stick (NCS) Neuronal Compute API.
  • ros2_moving_objectstars4 - Addressing moving objects based on messages generated by Object Analytics ros2_object_analytics.
  • ros2_openvino_toolkitstars91 - ROS2 wrapper for CV API of OpenVINO™ (human vision emulation).
  • ros2_grasp_librarystars87 - Probably a grasp library :).
  • apriltag_rosstars6 - ROS2 node for AprilTag detection.
  • ros2-web-bridgestars118 - Bridging your browser to the ROS 2.0.
  • ros2_message_filtersstars16 - ros2_message_filters blends various messages based on the conditions that filter needs to met and derives from ROS2 porting of ROS message_filters.
  • ros2-tensorflowstars28 - ROS2 nodes for computer vision tasks in Tensorflow.
  • ros2_pytorchstars16 - ROS2 nodes for computer vision tasks in PyTorch .
  • pidstars3 - A PID controller for ROS2.
  • system-modesstars16 - System modes for ROS 2 and micro-ROS.
  • darknet_ros - ROS2 wrapper for deploying Darknet's YOLO Computer Vision model.

Middleware

  • Micro XRCE-DDS Agentstars28 - Micro XRCE-DDS Agent acts as a server between DDS Network and Micro XRCE-DDS Clients.
  • Micro XRCE-DDS Agent docker - Docker image containing the Micro XRCE-DDS Agent.
  • Micro XRCE-DDS Clientstars35 - Micro XRCE-DDS implements a client-server protocol to enable resource-constrained devices (clients) to take part in DDS communications.
  • micro-ROS-Agentstars12 - ROS 2 package using Micro XRCE-DDS Agent.
  • Eclipse Zenohstars224 - Zenoh is a scalable and extremely performant protocol that can be used transparently used to interact with ROS2 applications as well as for R2X communication. (https://img.shields.io/github/stars/eclipse-zenoh/zenoh)
  • Eclipse Zenoh-Plugin-DDSstars28 - This is a zenoh plugin that allows to transparently route ROS2/DDS data over zenoh. This is commonly used for R2X communication over Wireless network or across the Internet. (https://img.shields.io/github/stars/eclipse-zenoh/zenoh-plugin-dds)

"System" bindings

  • rclandroid - Android API for ROS2.
  • rclnodejsstars137 - Node.js version of ROS2.0 client.
  • riot-ros2stars22 - This project enables ROS2 to run on microcontrollers using the RIOT Operating System.
  • ROS2-Integration-Servicestars12 - ROS2 Integration and Routing which provides a complete tool to integrate other technologies with ROS2 easily and enable ROS2 on WAN/Internet.
  • sossstars31 - The System Of Systems Synthesizer is used to integrate ROS2 via ROS2-Integration-Service with other (communication) systems.

Driver layer

  • Autoware.IO - Autoware.IO provides a heterogeneous hardware reference platform and enables the integration of member company's solutions onto platforms which support the Autoware.Auto and Autoware.AI software stack.
  • ros2_xmlrpc_interfacestars0 - ros2 interface package with xmlrpc, to communicate with a Sesto server using Sesto API.
  • cozmo_driver_ros2stars2 - Unofficial Anki Cozmo node for ROS2.
  • sphero_ros2stars1 - ROS2 sphero driver.
  • flock2stars29 - ROS2 driver for DJI Tello drones.
  • ros2_raspicam_nodestars3 - ROS2 node for Raspberry Pi camera.
  • joystick_driversstars6 - ROS2 drivers for joysticks.
  • joystick_drivers_from_scratchstars0 - Joystick driver packages for ROS 2.
  • joystick_ros2stars5 - Joystick driver for ROS2, support all platforms: Linux, macOS, Windows.
  • ros2_teleop_keyboardstars1 - Teleop Twist Keyboard for ROS2.
  • ros_astra_camerastars3 - ROS2 wrapper for Astra camera.
  • ros2_usb_camerastars23 - ROS2 General USB camera driver.
  • ros2_android_driversstars1 - Collection of ROS2 drivers for several Android sensors.
  • ros2_intel_realsensestars98 - ROS2 Wrapper for Intel® RealSense™ Devices.
  • raspicam2_nodestars20 - ROS2 node for camera module of Raspberry Pi.
  • ros2_track_imustars1 - ROS2 node for TrackIMU IMU sensor.
  • HRIMstars61 - A standard interface for robot modules.
  • FIROS2stars7 - ROS2 integrable tool focused in the intercommunication between ROS2 and FIWARE.
  • lino2_upperstars0 - Linorobot on ROS2.
  • RysROS2stars3 - ROS2 software stack for MiniRys robots.
  • px4_to_rosstars19 - ROS2/ROS packages for communicate PX4 with ROS.
  • multiwii_ros2stars6 - ROS2 Node for MultiWii and Cleanflight flight controllers.
  • ydlidar_ros2stars1 - ROS2 wrapper for ydlidar.
  • zed-ros2-wrapperstars29 - ROS 2 wrapper beta for the ZED SDK.
  • ros2_denso_radarstars3 - Toyota/Lexus 2015-2017 Denso Radar driver for ROS2.
  • sick_scan2stars23 - ROS2 driver for the SICK TiM series of laser scanners (TiM551/TiM561/TiM571).
  • ros2_ouster_driversstars41 - ROS2 Drivers for the Ouster OS-1 Lidars.
  • micro-ROS/hardware - Information and documentation about the hardware platforms used and supported in the micro-ROS project.
  • Blickfeld Cube 1 & Cube Range - ROS2 drivers for Blickfeld Cube 1 & Cube Range.

Client libraries

  • rcladastars7 - ROS Client Library for Ada.
  • rclcppstars190 - ROS Client Library for C++.
  • rclgostars30 - ROS Client Library for Go.
  • rclpystars78 - ROS Client Library for Python.
  • rcljava - ROS Client Library for Java.
  • rclnodejsstars137 - ROS Client Library for Node.js.
  • rclobjcstars15 - ROS Client Library for Objective C (for iOS).
  • rclcstars23 - ROS Client Library for C.
  • ros2_ruststars200 - Rust bindings for ROS2.
  • ros2_dotnetstars66 - .NET bindings for ROS2.

Client libraries common

  • rclstars55 - Library to support implementation of language specific ROS Client Libraries.
  • system_testsstars13 - Tests for rclcpp and rclpy.
  • rcl_interfacesstars8 - A repository for messages and services used by the ROS client libraries.

IDL generators

  • rosidl_generator_java - Generate the ROS interfaces in Java.
  • rosidl_generator_objc - Generate the ROS interfaces in Objective C.
  • rosidl_generator_cpp - Generate the ROS interfaces in C++.
  • rosidl_generator_c - Generate the ROS interfaces in C.
  • rosidlstars19 - Packages which provide the ROS IDL (.msg) definition and code generation.
  • rosidl_ddsstars2 - Generate the DDS interfaces for ROS interfaces.

RMW (ROS middleware)

  • rmw - Contains the ROS middleware API.
  • rmw_connext_cpp - Implement the ROS middleware interface using RTI Connext static code generation in C++.
  • rmw_fastrtps_cpp - Implement the ROS middleware interface using eProsima FastRTPS static code generation in C++.
  • rmw_dpsstars20 - Implementation of the ROS Middleware (rmw) Interface using Intel's Distributed Publish & Subscribe.
  • rmw_opensplice_cpp - Implement the ROS middleware interface using PrismTech OpenSplice static code generation in C++.
  • rmw_coredxstars0 - CoreDX DDS integration layer for ROS2.
  • rmw_freertpsstars0 - RMW implementation using freertps.
  • rmw_zenohstars13 - RMW implementation using Eclipse zenoh: Zero Overhead Pub/sub, Store/Query and Compute.
  • rcutilsstars30 - Common C functions and data structures used in ROS 2.
  • freertpsstars82 - a free, portable, minimalist, work-in-progress RTPS implementation.
  • rmw_cycloneddsstars49 - ROS2 RMW layer for Eclipse Cyclone DDS.
  • rmw_zenohstars13 - ROS2 RMW layer for zenoh.
  • rmw_iceoryxstars52 - Enables usage of the inter-process-communication middleware Eclipse iceoryx.

DDS communication mechanism implementations

  • Connext DDS - Connectivity Software for Developing and Integrating IIoT Systems.
  • Fast-RTPSstars770 - Implementation of RTPS Standard (RTPS is the wire interoperability protocol for DDS).
  • OpenSplicestars199 - Implementation of the OMG DDS Standard.
  • CoreDX DDS - Implementation of Twin Oaks Computing, Inc..
  • freertpsstars82 - A free, portable, minimalist, work-in-progress RTPS implementation.
  • cddsstars7 - Cyclone DDS is developed completely in the open and is undergoing the acceptance process to become part of Eclipse IoT.
  • Micro-XRCE-DDS)stars63 - An XRCE DDS implementation (supported by microROS).

Build system (Linux)

  • meta-ros2stars13 - ROS 2 Layer for OpenEmbedded Linux.

Build system (ROS2)

  • cistars22 - ROS 2 CI Infrastructure.
  • ament_cmake_export_jars - The ability to export Java archives to downstream packages in the ament buildsystem in CMake.
  • rmw_implementation_cmake - CMake functions which can discover and enumerate available implementations.
  • rmw_implementationstars11 - CMake infrastructure and dependencies for rmw implementations.

Operating systems

  • NuttXstars55 - NuttX fork of the official one for use with micro-ROS.
  • RIOTstars3.8k - RIOT is a real-time multi-threading operating system (...,) real-time capabilities, small memory footprint, (...) API offers partial POSIX compliance.
  • eMCOS - POSIX-compliant real-time OS for many-core processors expected to support AUTOSAR in the future.
  • PYNQ - Python-based rapid prototyping of high performance ML applications running on XILINX FPGAs.
  • Ubuntu Core - Build secure IoT devices with Ubuntu Core.
  • Ubuntu Server
  • VxWorksstars34 - The Secure, Safe, Reliable, and Certifiable real-time OS for Critical Infrastructure
  • Zephyr - Linux Foundation Projects RTOS aiming at beeing secure and safe.

Forks

  • Apex.OS - Apex.OS is a fork of ROS 2 that has been made so robust and reliable that it can be used in safety-critical applications.

Documentation

  • ROS Index - Future single entry point into ROS2 documentation (BETA).
    • Foxy packages.
    • Dashing packages.
    • Crystal packages.
    • Bouncy packages.
    • Ardent packages.
  • ROS 2 Design - Articles which inform and guide the ROS 2.0 design efforts.
  • ROS 2 Docs (Overview) - Details about ROS 2 internal design and organisation.
  • ROS 2 Tutorials - Study about ROS2 concept, libraries, build, and development with demoes/examples.
  • ROS 2 Wiki - Entry point to find all kind of information about ROS 2.
  • ROS 2 Distribution (rosdistro)stars2 - Info about distributions and the included packages.
  • ROS2 package status.
    • Bouncy package status - Status of ROS Bouncy packages.
    • Ardent package status - Status of ROS2 Ardent packages.
  • ROS2 Buildfarm - Build information (Jenkins build farm).
  • ROS2 CLI cheats sheet - A cheats sheet for ROS 2 Command Line Interface.

  • ROS Answers
  • ROS News
  • ROS Planet
  • Stack Overflow

Services

Robotics Capture the Flag (RCTF)

  • rctf-liststars24 - A list of Robotics CTF (RCTF) scenarios.

Companies

  • Acutronic Robotics - Not existing anymore. Initiators of the Hardware Robot Information Model (HRIM), Hardware Robot Operating System (H-ROS) and creators of the world's first modular industrial robot arm MARA.
  • ADLINK - "Leading EDGE COMPUTING".
  • Alias Robotics - Products and services in the context of robot cybersecurity.
  • Amazon - Robotics Team of Amazon Amazon Web Services (AWS).
  • Apex.AI - "Safe and certified software for autonomous mobility".
  • AutonomouStuff - "The world leader in autonomy systems and solutions".
  • Bosch - Robotics Team of Bosch Research.
  • Canonical - The company behind Ubuntu.
  • Eprosima - "The middleware experts".
  • Ericsson Research - Connect ROS2 applications to 5G networks for M2M communication.
  • FARobot - Swarm Robot System, a ROS 2/DDS based Fleet Management System.
  • Fraunhofer Institute for Manufacturing Engineering and Automation IPA - Robot and assistive systems.
  • GESTALT ROBOTICS - Service provider for intelligent automation.
  • iRobot - Manufacturer of vacuuming and mopping robots.
  • Klepsydra Technologies.
  • MathWorks - ROS Toolbox.
  • Mission Robotics - Hardware and Software for a new era of Marine Intelligence.
  • Roboception GmbH - Real-Time Perception for Your Robot.
  • ROBOOX - OPEN-SOURCE SOFTWARE ECOSYSTEM FOR CONSUMER ROBOTS.
  • Rover Robotics - Rugged, industrial-grade robots.
  • Sony Corporation.
  • synapticon - ROS compatible motion control and drive products with efforts to support ROS2.
  • Wind River - ROS2 for VxWorks.
